page_content:
Prerequisite: CCJS100 and CCJS105.

Credit Only Granted for. CCJS405 or CCJS498G.

Formerly: CCJS498G.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

CCJS418 Seminar in Criminology and Criminal Justice (3 Credits) Selected topics of interest in the field of Criminology and Criminal Justice will be covered.

Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.

CCJS428 Special Topics in Criminology and Criminal Justice (3 Credits) Topics in various aspects of the field of criminology and criminal justice will be covered.

Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.
